Awards May 2026

Luxenest Properties Honoured: 100 African Iconic Personalities of the Year 2026

Anesu Chekururama, Founder & CEO of Luxenest Properties, has been honoured as one of the 100 African Iconic Personalities of the Year at the 2026 Summit in Lagos, Nigeria — issued by Mayorkings Agency & Iconic International Holdings in April 2026.

This recognition celebrates African excellence and leadership in driving a self-reliant continent — highlighting Anesu's contributions to the luxury real estate sector and her commitment to innovation as a young African entrepreneur.

Read Full Story →

Three-Time Award Nominated Property Management Brand

Since our founding, Luxenest Properties has been recognised three times for excellence in property management, guest experience and luxury hospitality standards across South Africa's competitive short-term rental market.

🥇 2024 Nomination — Property Excellence Award
🥇 2025 Nomination — Short-Term Rental Innovation
🥇 2026 Nomination — Best Luxury STR Brand, SA
